query_title: The Last Black Man in San Francisco

recommendations.title: Someone Great
recommendations.overview: An aspiring music journalist lands her dream job and is about to move to San Francisco when her boyfriend of nine years decides to call it quits. To nurse her broken heart, she and her two best friends spend one outrageous last adventure in New York

recommendations.title: Chelsea Peretti: One of the Greats
recommendations.overview: Standup special filmed live at the Palace of Fine Arts in San Francisco.

recommendations.title: Vertigo
recommendations.overview: A retired San Francisco detective suffering from acrophobia investigates the strange activities of an old friend's wife, all the while becoming dangerously obsessed with her.

recommendations.title: The Teacher Who Promised the Sea
recommendations.overview: The buried memories of the Spanish Civil War are unearthed as a woman searches for the remains of her grandfather's father and discovers the story of an idealistic young teacher from Tarragona.

recommendations.title: Friendship!

recommendations.title: The Other End of the Line
recommendations.overview: An employee at an Indian call-center travels to San Francisco to be with a guy she falls for over the phone.

recommendations.title: Don't Worry, I'm Fine
recommendations.overview: A 19-year-old searches for her twin brother after he runs away from home, following a fight with their father.

recommendations.title: Dororo
recommendations.overview: Hyakkimaru, a warrior on a quest to reclaim 48 of his body parts which were each taken by a demon, is joined by Dororo, a thief on a quest to avenge the death of her parents.
